final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing character illustration for an ancient-style game (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "神秘东方古风" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 新中式 digital illustration movement, 宋画 ink-and-color figure painting tradition, 仙侠游戏立绘 (contemporary xianxia game character art heritage); exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: needs a full-body or three-quarter portrait composition suited for game character art — exact framing is yours
Subject: must include a 汉服 woman playing the guqin (抚琴), robes billowing ethereally (衣袂飘飘), with an otherworldly immortal presence (仙气十足)
Scene/backdrop: must include a bamboo forest (竹林) setting; moonlight filtering through bamboo leaves casting dappled shadows (斑驳光影)
Lighting/mood: needs a mysterious, moonlit night atmosphere with soft dappled light — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a cool, ethereal direction with deep shadow and luminous highlight contrast — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a delicate, painterly surface treatment evoking silk, ink wash, and soft glow — exact grain and sheen is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default
Avoid:
